flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Truett McConnell University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.9k → $26.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Truett McConnell University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.9k → $26.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Truett McConnell University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (838 → 744).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Truett McConnell University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
